scripts.build: npm run bundle && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('scripts/entry.cjs','dist/entry.cjs')" && npx pkg dist/entry.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --output dist/url-downloader.exe --public --no-bytecode && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('web','dist/web',{recursive:true})"
scripts.build:all: npm run bundle && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('scripts/entry.cjs','dist/entry.cjs')" && npx pkg dist/entry.cjs --targets node20-win-x64,node20-macos-x64,node20-linux-x64 --out-path dist --public --no-bytecode && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('web','dist/web',{recursive:true})"
